title: Pass 5.A.4 follow-up: implement mpi backend FFI bindings
description:
Replaces closed #459 (Add additional distributed backends: Gloo, MPI, UCC). The mpi_backend.rs module is currently a fail-fast skeleton (every Backend method returns Err(BackendUnavailable { backend: "mpi" })). Real implementation requires:

- The `mpi` Rust crate (wraps Open MPI / MPICH C ABI)
- A working MPI install at compile time (`mpicc` on PATH) and `libmpi.so` at runtime
- CI infrastructure with multiple MPI processes — substantially different from typical cargo-test setups

Adding the dep unconditionally would break workspace builds on systems without MPI. Gated behind `mpi-backend` feature (default off).
